description: Tiger Data provides a PostgreSQL-based data platform for time-series analytics, real-time event data, and search workloads. Its offerings include Tiger Cloud, a managed PostgreSQL service, and TimescaleDB-related extensions and tooling.
summary: Tiger Data exposes a documented MCP server at `https://mcp.tigerdata.com/docs`; its public docs also describe database connectivity and product documentation, but I could not verify any separate public HTTP/GraphQL API or CLI surface from the scraped developer pages.
